author: Rene Groeschke
message:
Update Gradle wrapper to 9.6.0 (#2532)

* Fix Gradle 9.6 deprecation warnings

- Replace deprecated Project.getProperties().containsKey() with
  project.hasProperty() in buildSrc/build.gradle, qa/build.gradle,
  and qa/kerberos/build.gradle
- Remove deprecated EclipseJdt.javaRuntimeName from BuildPlugin.groovy;
  modern Eclipse uses Buildship's direct Gradle import so this
  generated-file-only property is no longer needed

* Update Gradle wrapper to 9.6.0

* Update Gradle wrapper to 9.6.0
